error_signature: initial value not showing in multi-select
title: Initial value not displaying in multi-select
symptom: The multi-select component is not displaying the initial value set for the assigned user ID, despite being bound correctly.
applies_when: Multi-select is bound to a collection
Initial value is set to the ID of an assigned user
not_this_if: Multi-select is not bound to a valid collection
root_cause: The initial value for the multi-select may not be correctly referenced. Using the correct object path is crucial for the component to recognize and display the intended value.
fix_steps: Ensure that 'selectedTask' is correctly defined and accessible in the context
agent_instruction: Update the initial value of the multi-select to [selectedTask.assignedTo.id].
